xact.t: abbr. exact(ly) 精确的（地），准确的（地）（代号）; X (in any computer) automatic code translation X（任何计算机）自动编码转换器

xalapa.t: abbr. Jalapa 贾拉普公司（美国公司）（代号）

xanadu.t: n. 华厦,行宫,世外桃源

xanax.t: n. 阿普唑仑（药名）；赞安诺；相呐斯（镇静剂）；性药名
xanax.d: n an antianxiety agent (trade name Xanax) of the benzodiazepine class

xanthaematin.t: [医] 血黄素, 黄色正铁血红素(血红素黄色衍生物)

xanthamide.d:
n. An amido derivative of xanthic acid obtained as a white
   crystalline substance, C2H5O.CS.NH2; -- called also xanthogen amide.

xanthan.t: n. 黄原胶（增稠剂和稳定剂在食品工业, 医学和药学领域）

xanthate.t:
n. 黄原酸盐
[化] 黄原酸盐(或酯)
xanthate.d: n. a salt or ester of xanthic acid

xanthation.t: 黄原酸化作用, 黄化

xanthein.t: n. 黄色色素, 花黄素

xanthelasma.d: n xanthoma of the eyelids; occurs chiefly in the elderly

xanthelasmoidea.t: [医] 类黄瘤, 着色性荨麻疹

xanthematin.t: 血黄素, 黄色正铁血红素

xanthemia.d: n excess carotene in the blood stream; can cause the skin to turn a pale yellow or red color

xanthemia test.t: [医] 胡萝卜素血试验(检胡萝卜素血)

xanthian.t: a. 赞西亚的（土耳其西南部一城市）
xanthian.d:
a. Of or pertaining to Xanthus, an ancient town on Asia
   Minor; -- applied especially to certain marbles found near that place,
   and now in the British Museum.

xanthic.t:
a. 黄色的, 黄嘌呤的, 带黄色的
[医] 黄色的, 黄嘌呤的
xanthic.d:
a. Tending toward a yellow color, or to one of those colors,
   green being excepted, in which yellow is a constituent, as scarlet,
   orange, etc.
a. Possessing, imparting, or producing a yellow color; as,
   xanthic acid.
a. Of or pertaining to xanthic acid, or its compounds;
   xanthogenic.
a. Of or pertaining to xanthin.

xanthic acid.t:
黄原酸, 氧荒酸
[化] 黄原酸; 乙氧基二硫代甲酸

xanthic disulfide.t: [化] 二硫化黄原酰; 二硫化二黄原酰

xanthide.d: n. A compound or derivative of xanthogen.

xanthin.t:
n. 叶黄素
[医] 植物黄质
xanthin.d:
n. A crystalline nitrogenous body closely related to both
   uric acid and hypoxanthin, present in muscle tissue, and occasionally
   found in the urine and in some urinary calculi. It is also present in
   guano. So called from the yellow color of certain of its salts
   (nitrates).
n. A yellow insoluble coloring matter extracted from yellow
   flowers; specifically, the coloring matter of madder.
n. One of the gaseous or volatile decomposition products of
   the xanthates, and probably identical with carbon disulphide.

xanthine.t:
n. 黄质, 黄嘌呤
[化] 黄嘌呤
xanthine.d: n. crystalline oxidation product of the metabolism of nucleoproteins; precursor of uric acid; found in many organs and in urine

xanthine bodies.t: [医] 黄嘌呤体, 嘌呤硷

xanthine oxidase.t:
[化] 黄嘌呤氧化酶
[医] 黄嘌呤氧化酶

xanthine test.t: [医] 黄嘌呤试验(检血一氧化碳)

xanthines.t:
(xanthine 的第三人称 -s形式) n. 黄质, 黄嘌呤
[化] 黄嘌呤
xanthines.d:
-s form of xanthine
n. crystalline oxidation product of the metabolism of nucleoproteins; precursor of uric acid; found in many organs and in urine

xanthinin.t: n. 一种类似尿素的盐基性白色结晶

xanthinol niacinate.t: [化] 占替诺烟酸盐; 烟胺羟丙茶碱

xanthippe.t: n. 粘西比(苏格拉底之妻), 悍妇

xanthium.d:
n. A genus of composite plants in which the scales of the
   involucre are united so as to form a kind of bur; cocklebur; clotbur.

xantho-.d:
A combining form from Gr. xanqo`s yellow; as in
   xanthocobaltic salts. Used also adjectively in chemistry.

xanthobilirubic acid.t:
[化] 黄胆红酸
[医] 黄胆红酸

xanthochroi.d:
n. pl. A division of the Caucasian races, comprising the
   lighter-colored members.

xanthochroic.d:
a. Having a yellowish or fair complexion; of or
   pertaining to the Xanthochroi.

xanthochroism.t: n. (某些动物尤指水族馆金鱼的)黄色现象

xanthochromic jaundice.t: [医] 黄变病性黄疸, 掌跖粘膜黄疸

xanthochroous.t: a. (皮肤和头发)呈淡黄色的,带黄色的

xanthocilin.t: [化] 占托西林; 黄青霉素

xanthocyanopsia.t: 红绿色盲, 黄蓝视症

xanthogen.d:
n. The hypothetical radical supposed to be characteristic
   of xanthic acid.
n. Persulphocyanogen.

xanthogenate.d: n. A salt of xanthic acid.

xanthogenic acid.t:
[化] 黄原酸; 氧荒酸; (专指)乙基黄原酸
[医] 黄原酸, 硫羟羰碳酸乙酯

xanthokyanopy.t: [医] 红绿色盲, 黄蓝视症

xanthoma.t:
n. 黄瘤, 黄疣, 黄色瘤
[医] 黄瘤
xanthoma.d: n. a skin problem marked by the development (on the eyelids and neck and back) of irregular yellow nodules; sometimes attributable to disturbances of cholesterol metabolism

xanthomatosis.d: n widespread xanthomas (especially on elbows and knees); often associated with a disorder of lipid metabolism

xanthomatosis bulbi.t: [医] 眼球黄瘤病(角膜脂变)

xanthomelanous.t: a. 有橄榄色(或黄色)皮肤和黑色头发的

xanthomonad.d: n bacteria producing yellow non-water-soluble pigments; some pathogenic for plants

xanthomonas.d: n a genus of bacteria similar to Pseudomonas but producing a yellow pigment that is not soluble in water

xanthomous.t:
xanthomous (comparative more xanthomous, superlative most xanthomous)
Of or pertaining to a xanthoma.

xanthomycin.t: n. [微]链霉黄素,胍甲四环素

xanthone.t: n. [化]一种化学原料(为杀虫剂及合成染料)

xanthonic acid.t: [化] 黄原酸; 乙氧基二硫代甲酸

xanthophane.d:
n. The yellow pigment present in the inner segments of
   the retina in animals. See Chromophane.

xanthophyl.t: n. 叶黄素, 胡萝卜醇
xanthophyl.d: n yellow carotenoid pigments in plants and animal fats and egg yolks

xanthophyll.d: n yellow carotenoid pigments in plants and animal fats and egg yolks

xanthoproteic test.t: [医] 黄色蛋白试验(检蛋白质)

xanthoprotein.d:
n. A yellow acid substance formed by the action of hot
   nitric acid on albuminous or proteid matter. It is changed to a deep
   orange-yellow color by the addition of ammonia.

xanthopsia.t:
n. 黄幻视, 视物显黄症, 黄视症
[医] 黄视症
xanthopsia.d: n. visual defect in which objects appear to have a yellowish hue; sometimes occurs in cases of jaundice

xanthopsin.t: 视黄质, 眼黄素(昆虫)

xanthopsy.t: n. (=xanthopsia)黄视症, 所看之物皆显黄色之症

xanthopsylla cheopis.t: [医] 印鼠客蚤, 开皇客蚤, 鼠疫蚤, 印度鼠蚤

xanthopterin.t: 黄蝶呤, 2-氨基-4, 6-二羟基蝶呤

xanthopuccine.t: [医] 坎那丁(一种北美黄连硷)
xanthopuccine.d:
n. One of three alkaloids found in the root of the
   yellow puccoon (Hydrastis Canadensis). It is a yellow crystalline
   substance, and resembles berberine.

xanthorhamnin.d:
n. A glucoside extracted from Persian berries as a
   yellow crystalline powder, used as a dyestuff.

xanthorhamnine.t: (用伊朗或土耳其产的一种浆果制成的)黄色色素(染料)

xanthorrhoea.t: [医] 澳洲香树, 香树脂

xanthorrhoeaceae.t: [网络] 刺叶树科；黄脂木科；草树

xanthorubin.t: [医] 血清黄色素(肝切除后血清内所见)

xanthosine monophosphate.t: [化] 黄苷酸; 黄苷一磷酸

xanthosis.t: n. 黄肤症, 黄变病
xanthosis.d: n an abnormal yellow discoloration of the skin

xanthosoma sagittifolium.t: [网络] 千年芋；箭叶黄体芋；马兰加块茎

xanthostemone.t: 黄梗酮, 3-羟-4, 4-二甲-2-异丁基环己-2, 5-二烯-1-酮

xanthous.t:
a. 黄色的, 黄色人种的, 蒙古人种的
[医] 黄的, 黄色的
xanthous.d: s of the color intermediate between green and orange in the color spectrum; of something resembling the color of an egg yolk

xanthoxin.t: n. [生化]黄氧素(光致氧化作用的产物, 在某些植物组织里起抑制生长的作用)

xanthoxylene.d:
n. A liquid hydrocarbon of the terpene series extracted
   from the seeds of a Japanese prickly ash (Xanthoxylum pipertium) as an
   aromatic oil.

xanthoxylum.d:
n. A genus of prickly shrubs or small trees, the bark and
   rots of which are of a deep yellow color; prickly ash.

xanthoxylum ailanthoides.t: [医] 老鸦椒, 樗叶花椒

xanthus.t: n. 克桑托斯（土耳其古城）

xanthydrol reaction.t: [医] 黄嘌呤醇反应(见于尿毒症组织)

xanthylic acid.t:
[化] 黄苷酸; 黄苷一磷酸
[医] 黄[嘌呤核]甙酸

xanthylic-nucleic acid.t: [医] 黄嘌呤核酸, 黄尿环核酸

xantippe.t: n. 粘西比(苏格拉底之妻), 悍妇, 泼妇

xat.t: n. 为纪念死者的雕刻柱

xavi.t: 哈维 （西班牙足球运动员）

xavier.d: n. Spanish missionary and Jesuit who establish missionaries in Japan and Ceylon and the East Indies (1506-1552)

xaxa.t: [医]阿司匹林，乙酰水杨酸，醋柳酸，醋酰基水杨酸[解热镇痛药，抗凝血药]
